import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:8080/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Add token to requests
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>Promise.reject(error));// Auth APIs
export const authAPI={login:(email,password)=>api.post('/auth/login',{email,password}),register:data=>api.post('/auth/register',data),validateToken:token=>api.post('/auth/validate',{token})};// Shipment APIs
export const shipmentAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/shipments'),getById:id=>api.get("/shipments/".concat(id)),getByTracking:trackingNumber=>api.get("/shipments/tracking/".concat(trackingNumber)),search:query=>api.get("/shipments/search?query=".concat(query)),getByStatus:status=>api.get("/shipments/status/".concat(status)),getDelayed:()=>api.get('/shipments/delayed'),getBySupplier:supplierId=>api.get("/shipments/supplier/".concat(supplierId)),create:data=>api.post('/shipments',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/shipments/".concat(id),data),updateStatus:(id,status)=>api.patch("/shipments/".concat(id,"/status"),{status}),delete:id=>api.delete("/shipments/".concat(id)),getStats:()=>api.get('/shipments/stats/summary')};// Supplier APIs
export const supplierAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/suppliers'),getById:id=>api.get("/suppliers/".concat(id)),search:query=>api.get("/suppliers/search?query=".concat(query)),getByCountry:country=>api.get("/suppliers/country/".concat(country)),getLowReliability:threshold=>api.get("/suppliers/low-reliability?threshold=".concat(threshold)),create:data=>api.post('/suppliers',data),update:(id,data)=>api.put("/suppliers/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>api.delete("/suppliers/".concat(id)),getStats:()=>api.get('/suppliers/stats/summary'),getByCountryStats:()=>api.get('/suppliers/stats/by-country')};// Risk APIs
export const riskAPI={calculate:shipmentId=>api.post("/risk/calculate/".concat(shipmentId)),predict:shipmentId=>api.post("/risk/predict/".concat(shipmentId)),calculateAll:()=>api.post('/risk/calculate-all'),getHighRisk:()=>api.get('/risk/high-risk'),getCriticalRisk:()=>api.get('/risk/critical-risk'),getPredictedDelays:()=>api.get('/risk/predicted-delays'),getScore:shipmentId=>api.get("/risk/score/".concat(shipmentId)),getPrediction:shipmentId=>api.get("/risk/prediction/".concat(shipmentId)),getStats:()=>api.get('/risk/stats/summary'),getDistribution:()=>api.get('/risk/stats/distribution')};// Analytics APIs
export const analyticsAPI={getDashboard:()=>api.get('/analytics/dashboard'),getQuickStats:userId=>api.get("/analytics/quick-stats?userId=".concat(userId)),getShipmentSummary:()=>api.get('/analytics/shipments/summary'),getSupplierSummary:()=>api.get('/analytics/suppliers/summary'),getRiskSummary:()=>api.get('/analytics/risk/summary'),getUnreadCount:userId=>api.get("/analytics/notifications/unread?userId=".concat(userId)),getShipmentStatusChart:()=>api.get('/analytics/charts/shipment-status'),getMonthlyShipmentsChart:()=>api.get('/analytics/charts/monthly-shipments'),getRiskDistributionChart:()=>api.get('/analytics/charts/risk-distribution'),getSuppliersByCountryChart:()=>api.get('/analytics/charts/suppliers-by-country')};// Notification APIs
export const notificationAPI={getByUser:userId=>api.get("/notifications/user/".concat(userId)),getUnread:userId=>api.get("/notifications/user/".concat(userId,"/unread")),getRecent:(userId,limit)=>api.get("/notifications/user/".concat(userId,"/recent?limit=").concat(limit)),markAsRead:id=>api.patch("/notifications/".concat(id,"/read")),markAllAsRead:userId=>api.patch("/notifications/user/".concat(userId,"/read-all")),delete:id=>api.delete("/notifications/".concat(id)),getUnreadCount:userId=>api.get("/notifications/user/".concat(userId,"/unread-count"))};export default api;
